center.name: 聖伊莎貝爾島
center.summary: 聖伊莎貝爾島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Crested cuckoo-dove、Red-capped myzomela、Yellow-throated white-eye，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The crested cuckoo-dove is endemic to the Solomon Islands archipelago, where it is found in valleys on the islands of Bougainville, Choiseul, Santa Isabel, Kolombangara, New Georgia, Vangunu, Nggatokae, Rendova, Guadalcanal, Malaita, Makira, Three Sisters, and Ugi

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Solomon Islands archipelago (Buka, Bougainville, the Shortland Islands, Fauro, Choiseul and Santa Isabel)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Solomon Islands archipelago (Bougainville, Choiseul, Santa Isabel and Nggela Islands)
